texto: Servants are not allowed to ask questions. They are only supposed to follow orders. That attitude has to change. But in order for it to change, there has to be radical improvement in the quality of the intelligence produced by the Mexican government.
explicacao: Citação de Adolfo Aguilar Zinser sobre temas ligados a inteligencia. “Servants are not allowed to ask questions. They are only supposed to follow orders. That attitude…” articula inteligencia, change, government em registro de inteligencia, com relevância para contextos como mudanca e government.
